tracks.meaning: a thing or things belonging to or owned by someone; possessions or real estate
an item of ownership convertible into cash; an asset on a balance sheet
a characteristic or quality belonging to a person or thing
a measurable attribute of a substance such as color, density, or reactivity
a portable object or item used as a stage prop in a performance
an attribute or field that stores a value or characteristic of a data object
a characteristic or trait of an organism determined by genetics or environment
a quality or feature that is notable or desirable in a person
